title: Catbal on Hyperliquid
summary_title: Catbal's pyramid NFTs, trait trading, and Hyperliquid's resistance to cartels
summary_description: How a year-old meme became a tiered NFT project with customizable traits, and why the community fights PayPal influence.

key_moments.label: Catbal introduction: one year old, first memes on Hyperliquid
Origin story: launched semi-accidentally via Agefun token creator in May
Pivot to NFTs: 1500 wallets, 10k HYPE volume at mint, free PFPs on Soul Bound
Five-tier pyramid structure: 1416 Tier 1 to 20 Tier 5, inspired by Illuminati/Buddhism
ERC721 + ERC1155 reveal strategy: traits as tradeable items, partner integrations
Game roadmap: roguelike dungeon experience, PvP, utility via traits distribution
Catbal's post on PayPal integration: crypto hijacked by establishment figures
Hyperliquid wins: USDC native, Paxos coming, hype near all-time high at 59

pull_quote: If you want to be a billionaire in crypto it has to come from somewhere, and it feels off because it is a zero-sum game.
